creator: euan@potensol.com
text:
Martin your patch was mostly good. However I changed a couple things. The main difference is that the LIB_DEPENDS must be option specific.

Thanks for the work you put into this, saved me time.

Please test my latest version. I've attached a patch. But you can also get the latest revision from my github page: https://github.com/ethoms/freebsd-ports . There are some new patches in the devel/sope port as well, they could do with testing.

I'm going to run it on a production server for a couple days more before I submit it.
